# Bio Connext — Premium Medical Tourism in Thailand
> Thailand's premier medical concierge service for international patients

## About
Bio Connext is a premium medical concierge service based in Bangkok, Thailand, founded in 2015. We coordinate end-to-end healthcare journeys for international patients seeking medical treatment in Thailand, partnering with JCI-accredited hospitals and 50+ board-certified specialist doctors.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2015, Bangkok, Thailand
- Patients served: 10,000+ from 45+ countries
- Specialist partners: 50+ board-certified doctors
- Patient rating: 4.9/5 average
- Accreditations: JCI, ISO 9001:2015, TEMOS, MTQUA
- Languages: English, Thai, Chinese, and 7+ more
- Support: 24/7 multilingual concierge

## Services
- Specialist Doctor Matching: Personalized matching with board-certified specialists across 15+ medical disciplines
- Second Medical Opinions: Remote consultations with Thai specialists for existing diagnoses
- Advanced Therapies: Access to stem cell therapy, regenerative medicine, and cutting-edge treatments
- Post-Surgery Nursing: In-hotel and in-home nursing care during recovery
- VIP Medical Transport: Airport meet-and-greet, luxury transfers, ambulance coordination
- Medical Interpretation: Professional certified interpreters in 10+ languages
- Insurance Liaison: Direct coordination with international insurance providers
- 24/7 Concierge Support: Round-the-clock multilingual assistance

## Medical Specialties
- Cardiology & Cardiac Surgery
- Orthopedics & Joint Replacement
- Oncology & Cancer Treatment
- Dental & Cosmetic Dentistry
- Ophthalmology & LASIK
- Fertility & IVF
- Cosmetic & Plastic Surgery
- Bariatric & Weight Loss Surgery
- Neurology & Neurosurgery
- Dermatology

## Cost Advantage
Medical procedures in Thailand typically cost 40-70% less than in the United States, United Kingdom, or Australia, while maintaining international quality standards at JCI-accredited facilities.
